ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "inst_nm" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the institution is located */,
  "stabbr" TEXT /* State abbreviation of the institution's location */,
  "hbcu" INTEGER /* Whether the institution is a Historically Black College or University (HBCU) */,
  "menonly" INTEGER /* Whether the institution is men-only */,
  "womenonly" INTEGER /* Whether the institution is women-only */,
  "relaffil" INTEGER /* Whether the institution has a religious affiliation */,
  "inst_type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., public, private, HBCU, community college) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "accreditation" TEXT /* Status of accreditation */,
  "total_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for general inquiries */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "adm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admissions entry */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the admissions data belongs to */,
  "satvrmid" INTEGER /* Middle 50% SAT verbal score */,
  "satmtmid" INTEGER /* Middle 50% SAT math score */,
  "distanceonly" INTEGER /* Whether the institution offers distance-only programs */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  "acceptance_rate" REAL /* Percentage of applicants accepted */,
  "yield_rate" REAL /* Percentage of accepted students who enroll */,
  "application_fee" INTEGER /* Application fee amount */,
  "early_decision" INTEGER /* Whether the institution offers early decision */,
  "early_action" INTEGER /* Whether the institution offers early action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid" (
  "fid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial aid entry */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the financial aid data belongs to */,
  "pctpell" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving Pell grants */,
  "pctfloan" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving federal loans */,
  "ug25abv" REAL /* Percentage of students with earnings above $25,000 10 years after graduation */,
  "md_earn_wne_p10" INTEGER /* Median earnings of working graduates 10 years after graduation */,
  "grad_debt_mdn_supp" INTEGER /* Median debt of graduates who received federal loans */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  "average_pell_grant" REAL /* Average amount of Pell grants awarded */,
  "average_loan_amount" REAL /* Average amount of federal loans */,
  "average_cost_attendance" REAL /* Average cost of attendance */,
  "net_price" REAL /* Net price after financial aid */,
  "loan_default_rate" REAL /* Rate of default on federal loans */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "prog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the program belongs to */,
  "prog_nm" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "prog_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the program data was collected */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "program_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "tuition_fee" REAL /* Tuition fee for the program */,
  "enrollment_requirement" TEXT /* JSON object for enrollment requirements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "stud_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the student is enrolled at */,
  "stud_nm" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "stud_level" TEXT /* Level of the student (e.g., freshman, sophomore) */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the student data was collected */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race/ethnicity of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "international_student" INTEGER /* Whether the student is an international student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stud_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment entry */,
  "stud_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being enrolled */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the student is enrolled at */,
  "prog_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "enr_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the enrollment data was collected */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., enrolled, on leave, graduated) */,
  "credits_earned" INTEGER /* Credits earned by the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student in the program */,
  "expected_graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected date of graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_prog_id FOREIGN KEY ("prog_id") REFERENCES programs ("prog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_stud_id FOREIGN KEY ("stud_id") REFERENCES students ("stud_id")
)
